channel.title: Jacob Dart — Writing
channel.description: Field notes on turning owner-operator businesses into calm, compounding systems — automation, AI, and the operating-system mindset.

item.title: The system is you — and that's the problem
item.description: If your business would quietly break the moment you stepped away, you don't own a business — you own a job. Here's the test, where the work hides, and the first step out.
